Defendants Ana San Miguel And Grimaldo San Miguel'S Motion To Strike Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-14-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom Conference
Amanda Marie Dehart Esq; 415-771-9850; Tenderloin Housing Clinic; for Plaintiff Patricia Aparicio.
Court Reporter: Linda Forster CSR#13286 lforster@sftc.org
No other apperances.

No argument is held. Plaintiff's counsel appeared to confirm that the tentative ruling would be adopted.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendants Ana San Miguel And Grimaldo San Miguel'S Motion To Strike Complaint

Defendant's Motion to Strike Complaint is DENIED. Plaintiff's request for injunctive relief in conjunction with nuisance and UCL causes of action is not improper, irrelevant, false on not drawn in conformity with the laws. Plaintiff's counsel to prepare and submit a proposed order by email to Department210@sftc.org

Judge: Vedica Puri; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Linda Forster CSR#13286 lforster@sftc.org (210/VP)
